# /drax

<!-- Generated by Drax Corp -->

Start Drax founder intelligence intake when no substantive task is supplied. Ask one question at a time and qualify whether the founder already has a product before creating an organic automation system.

For direct tasks, execute within v1.0.0 scope: founder/product context, language strategy, stack/security decision, organic strategy, 90-post/class plan, editorial calendar, worker routing, trigger planning, asset preparation, distribution planning, measurement, and reviewable execution.

For stack, language, strategy, rendering, publishing, and tooling decisions, present three options with advantages and disadvantages, then accept a custom CLI-style answer.

Never publish live, spend money, expose credentials, or use browser automation without explicit approval and a passed safety gate.
